'''shagosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loanee|loanee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loanee|loanee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shagosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shægesheth|shægesheth]] || [[word:shægeshej|shægeshej]] || [[word:shægeshesh|shægeshesh]] || [[word:shægeshe|shægeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagogoshoth|shagogoshoth]] || [[word:shagogoshoj|shagogoshoj]] || [[word:shagogoshosh|shagogoshosh]] || [[word:shagogosho|shagogosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagoshoth|shagoshoth]] || [[word:shagoshoj|shagoshoj]] || [[word:shagoshosh|shagoshosh]] || [[word:shagosho|shagosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagofshoth|shagofshoth]] || [[word:shagofshoj|shagofshoj]] || [[word:shagofshosh|shagofshosh]] || [[word:shagofshof|shagofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shagoshotho|shagoshotho]] || [[word:shagoshojo|shagoshojo]] || [[word:shagoshosho|shagoshosho]] || [[word:shagoshoko|shagoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shagoshoth|shagoshoth]] || [[word:shagoshoj|shagoshoj]] || [[word:shagoshosh|shagoshosh]] || [[word:shagosho|shagosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shagoshothol|shagoshothol]] || [[word:shagoshojol|shagoshojol]] || [[word:shagoshoshol|shagoshoshol]] || [[word:shagoshokol|shagoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shagoshothotho|shagoshothotho]] || [[word:shagoshojojo|shagoshojojo]] || [[word:shagoshoshosho|shagoshoshosho]] || [[word:shagoshoko|shagoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shagoshothon|shagoshothon]] || [[word:shagoshojon|shagoshojon]] || [[word:shagoshoshon|shagoshoshon]] || [[word:shagoshokon|shagoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shagoshothoro|shagoshothoro]] || [[word:shagoshojoro|shagoshojoro]] || [[word:shagoshoshoro|shagoshoshoro]] || [[word:shagoshokoro|shagoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
